title: dicellandra glanduligera
intro: Dicellandra glanduligera is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Stemonuraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Dicellandra glanduligera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and provide relief from various ailments.
